nodes.name: AGENTS
nodes.summary: Defines 9 subagent roles (Architect, Svelte Engineer, Toolsmith, Memory Engineer, Model Engineer, Safety Reviewer, Validation Reviewer, Researcher, Product Designer) with responsible skills, pre-flight checks, and hard constraints per role.

nodes.name: commands-readme
nodes.summary: Documents that .claude/commands/ is unsupported; maps slash commands to Skill-equivalent actions in a reference table.

nodes.name: post-edit-checklist
nodes.summary: Post-edit fallback script that scans a changed file path and prints which docs/registries need updating based on path patterns, plus requires npm run build and ai:validate.

nodes.name: pre-command-guard
nodes.summary: Detects destructive shell patterns (rm -rf, DROP TABLE, git push --force, chmod 777, npm publish etc.) and install patterns (npm install, npx), exiting with error for destructives and warning for installs.

nodes.name: pre-search-reminder
nodes.summary: Lightweight pre-search hook that prints a reminder to consult REPOSITORY_MAP.md when any search tool (glob, grep, find, ls) is invoked.

nodes.name: secret-guard
nodes.summary: Scans file content via stdin or args for secret patterns (OpenAI keys, Slack tokens, GitHub tokens, Google API keys, AWS access keys, base64 secrets) and blocks writes with exit(1).

nodes.name: session-end-protocol
nodes.summary: Prints a session-end protocol template for documenting changes, skills used, graph status, validation results, and next steps at the end of each work session.

nodes.name: settings-local
nodes.summary: Enables the svelte MCP server globally via enabledMcpjsonServers and enableAllProjectMcpServers flags.

nodes.name: ai-researcher
nodes.summary: Skill for researching AI topics: searches current sources, synthesizes findings into digests stored in memory_research table, displays in Research dashboard widget with quality rules.

nodes.name: app-factory-engineer
nodes.summary: Skill for creating multi-page Svelte apps from templates: scaffolds routes, layouts, forms, components, connects to API endpoints with full CRUD experience and 13 planned apps listed.

nodes.name: automation-engineer
nodes.summary: Skill for creating schedulers, reminders, and background jobs with non-negotiable safety rules: visibility, pausability, editability, execution logs, and no external autonomous communications.

nodes.name: coding-agent-engineer
nodes.summary: Skill for project scanning, architecture summaries, refactor planning, test generation, and code review with 9 coding agent safety rules.

nodes.name: documentation-engineer
nodes.summary: Skill for maintaining architecture docs, registries, decisions, and self-improvement logs. Maintains 12 documents with update triggers. Includes self-improvement log entry template.

nodes.name: graphify-navigator
nodes.summary: Skill for repository graph intelligence navigation. Operates in DEGRADED_GRAPH_MODE using docs/REPOSITORY_MAP.md as fallback before any structural change.

nodes.name: memory-engineer
nodes.summary: Skill for designing persistent local memory: database schema, RLS policies, Supabase migrations, TypeScript types, CRUD API, and search implementation with standard column schema.

nodes.name: model-provider-engineer
nodes.summary: Skill for creating LLM provider adapters (Ollama, LM Studio, vLLM, OpenAI-compatible, Anthropic, Gemini, OpenRouter). Implements LLMProvider interface with chat, chatStream, embed, listModels, healthCheck.

nodes.name: safety-guardian
nodes.summary: Skill preventing destructive actions, secret leaks, unsafe shells, and unauthorized publishing. Defines 3 approval levels, protected paths checklist, destructive command detection patterns, and secret detection regex.

nodes.name: senior-ai-engineer-coach
nodes.summary: Skill for creating learning paths, exercises, projects, interview prep, and progress tracking. Covers foundation/intermediate/advanced skill maps, portfolio project ideas, and interview topics.

nodes.name: skill-generator
nodes.summary: Skill for creating and registering new skills. Defines SKILL.md schema with required sections, validates workflows are repeatable, and manages skill registry updates.

nodes.name: svelte-architect
nodes.summary: Skill for designing SvelteKit architecture: route groups, layouts, server actions, API endpoints, and state management with runes. Defines project-specific SvelteKit conventions.

nodes.name: svelte-ui-engineer
nodes.summary: Skill for building clean responsive Svelte 5 UI with shared components, design tokens, Lucide icons, and minimalistic neutral design. Includes non-negotiable design rules and svelte-autofixer integration.

nodes.name: tool-factory-engineer
nodes.summary: Skill for creating new local tools from user requests: specification, Zod schemas, Supabase data model, API endpoint, Svelte UI page with dangerous tool confirmation rule.

nodes.name: validation-engineer
nodes.summary: Skill for creating and running validation gates: npm run check, npm run build, ai:validate. Defines failure root-cause analysis process and common pattern-to-fix mapping table.

nodes.name: codex-config
nodes.summary: Configures the svelte MCP server for Codex via npx @sveltejs/mcp with -y flag.

nodes.name: cursor-mcp
nodes.summary: Configures the svelte MCP server for Cursor IDE via npx @sveltejs/mcp in a JSON-based MCP server registry.
